articles.full_en: Politician who investigated spyware abuses had his phone hacked with Pegasus spyware. A government customer of NSO Group used the company's Pegasus spyware to hack into the phone of a European politician, who at the time was serving on an EU committee tasked with investigating the spyware industry.
